named-query.name: OrderSearchView.findByCustomerNameLike
named-query.query: select v from OrderSearchView v where lower(v.customerName) like lower(concat('%', ?1, '%')) order by v.createdAt desc

named-native-query.name: OrderSearchView.summaryByStatusNative
named-native-query.query: select status as status, count(*) as order_count, sum(total) as total_sum from purchase_orders where (:status is null or status = :status) group by status order by status

named-native-query.name: OrderSearchView.summaryByStatusNativeForTupleTransformer
named-native-query.query: select status as status, count(*) as order_count, sum(total) as total_sum from purchase_orders where (:status is null or status = :status) group by status order by status
